violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of residue/soiled. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Observed the presence of (pest activity) is not controlled as evidenced by (observing a dead rodent underneath stove). Staff removed dead pest, cleaned and sanitized area at time of inspection. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per interview of staff establishment has pest control. -Establishment staff will email PCS report to inspector. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine) sanitizing solution for the (3-bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the (bar area). New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the (kitchen closet, shelve behind the microwave, cabinet shelve) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

The floor in the (kitchen area and hall area) has an accumulation of debris (old pest dropping). The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026
The hand-washing sink in the basement bar area was observed with bottles/items in it. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

At the time of inspection, the small mini fridge behind the bar was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit is not to be used for storage of Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods until repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The floor to the side of the 3 bay sink and the ceiling soffit above the 3 bay sink was observed in need of repair/refinishing. Physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

The floor and wall junctures behind the 3 bay sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
